title: Purple Wither Hearts
body:
If your're like me youve died because you couldn't see how many hearts you had because of the withered effect.

I SAY NO MORE!!

I adjusted the color of the withered hearts to be purple so they stand out better, while also maintaining the withered sickened feel.![Easier to see](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa0eb96228260a55920f86c54322220f56ba40b1.png)
